name.ja: <ruby>魔<rt>ま</rt></ruby><ruby>力<rt>りょく</rt></ruby><ruby>到<rt>とう</rt></ruby><ruby>達<rt>たつ</rt></ruby>

text.en: Add 1 card from your Deck or GY to your hand that mentions "Spell Counter" in its text, except "Spell Power Attainment", then if you control a Level 7 or higher "Endymion" Monster Card, you can remove any number of Spell Counters from your field, and if you do, negate the effects of that many face-up cards your opponent controls, and if you do that, destroy them. You can only activate 1 "Spell Power Attainment" per turn.
text.zh-CN:
此卡名的卡1回合仅可发动1张。①：从自己牌组・墓地将除“魔力到达”以外的、1张效果文本记载有“魔力计数物”的卡加入手牌。自己场上存在等级7以上的“恩底弥翁”怪兽卡的情况下，进而可适用以下效果。
●去除自己场上任意数量的魔力计数物，依其数量将对手场上的表侧表示卡的效果无效并破坏。
